title: picea likiangensis subsp. balfouriana
intro: Picea likiangensis subsp. balfouriana, also known as Balfour's spruce, is a subspecies of coniferous evergreen tree that belongs to the pine family (Pinaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Balfour's spruce include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the needles and twigs of Balfour's spruce are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
